arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappé included in Real Madrid squad to face Villarreal despite France squad absence

arts.ttl: When is Real Madrid - Villarreal? Times, how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: Having followed up a 2-1 victory over Espanyol with a 3-1 triumph over Las Palmas, Marcelino García Toral’s team are up to third, one point behind Madrid. The LaLiga game between Real Madrid and Villarreal will be played on Saturday October 5, with kick-off at the Bernabéu scheduled for 3:00 p.m. ET / 12:00 noon PT .

arts.ttl: Real Madrid handed quadruple injury boost ahead of Villarreal showdown
arts.sum: Real Madrid will have Kylian Mbappe, Rodrygo, Eder Militao and Dani Ceballos available for Saturday's La Liga clash with Villarreal.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star opens door to William Saliba transfer
arts.sum: Rudiger went on to name Saliba as one of the top three centre-backs in the world alongside Arsenal teammate Gabriel. Real Madrid centre-back Antonio Rudiger has admitted his interest in playing alongside William Saliba at the Santiago Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: Why Fede Valverde’s close circle are ‘concerned’ about his situation at Real Madrid
arts.sum: Those closest to Real Madrid star Federico Valverde are growing increasingly concerned when it comes to the physical wellbeing of the midfielder. That’s according to Relevo, who have on Friday…

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “Real Madrid are still not at our level, we have players who are not at their best”
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti spoke to the media after the team’s first defeat of the season to Lille and ahead of a return to La Liga against Villarreal, speaking to say, “everyone can say what they want, nothing happens after what happened on Wednesday. “We will try to play as we always do, taking into account the good moment of the rival team, but we want to put much more intensity.”
